description: load_user_config wraps open() in a `with` block (context manager); read_log_tail and read_cache_blob leave the descriptor unclosed.

findings.rationale: load_user_config is structurally near-identical to read_log_tail and read_cache_blob (read a file, return its contents) but wraps open() in a `with` block. The context manager is load-bearing: on a hot path the file descriptor count grows until the process hits ulimit. An agent that normalises the three onto a shared helper will drop the `with` clause unless warned.
